false_allow_rate.reason: Shadow evaluation must never observe an unsafe allow against golden traces.

unnecessary_clarification_rate.reason: Clarification noise should stay rare while gates mature.

evidence_coverage_rate.reason: Evidence coverage must remain high before production routing changes.

unknown_to_block_conversion_rate.reason: Unknown escalation-critical values must block or clarify.

protected_path_escalation_rate.reason: Protected-path escalations must be detected as review-required.
